basics.name: Benjamin Hayden Duncan
basics.label: AI/ML Engineer | MLOps & World Modeling Infrastructure
basics.summary: AI/ML Engineer specializing in the deployment and scaling of complex models in constrained and high-dimensional environments. Expert in architecting MLOps pipelines for large-scale inference and distributed systems, with a focus on efficient model serving and secure data infrastructure.

work.name: Onebrief Inc.
work.summary: Architecting and implementing scalable AI services for edge computing and constrained environments.
highlights: Architected a scalable, modular inference service for deploying LLMs on Kubernetes in air-gapped environments, optimizing for high-dimensional data processing
Optimized model inference performance using vLLM and NVIDIA Triton for low-latency delivery in resource-constrained environments
Engineered RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines for secure document intelligence extraction, focusing on high-performance retrieval and processing
Developed custom layout detection algorithms and OCR services to handle complex, non-standard documentation structures

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.position: Machine Learning Engineer Sr. / Product Owner
work.summary: Full-lifecycle leadership of MLOps platforms and data-driven product strategy.
highlights: Standardized MLOps workflows using Kubeflow pipelines, reducing model deployment time by 40% for large-scale engineering teams
Designed and maintained resilient Kubernetes infrastructure on AWS to support TB-scale model training and high-throughput evaluation
Established a centralized model registry and framework-agnostic deployment tools to support diverse modeling environments (PyTorch/Triton)
Owned ML operations including model registry development and model framework tools for mission-critical deployments

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.position: Software Engineer - Data Platform & Product Owner
work.summary: Driving technical strategy for large-scale data storage and analytics platforms.
highlights: Led the development of a large-scale data storage and retrieval platform for terabytes of diverse data assets in S3 object storage
Designed Airflow ETL pipelines for ingesting structured and unstructured data, serving as the foundation for model training and evaluation
Built Python interfaces and tools for high-performance querying and access of large-scale distributed data solutions

work.name: Lockheed Martin
work.position: Software Engineer - Data Analytics & Scrum Master
work.summary: Facilitating agile delivery of expert systems and telemetry analysis tools.
highlights: Generated and prepared simulated missile telemetry data for ingestion into Machine Learning pipelines, focusing on high-fidelity signal analysis
Developed advanced data analysis tools and Expert Systems using Python for telemetry visualization and anomaly detection
